issue_summary: followup. improve handling of null handler name to make semantics closer to what they were before ConcurrentHashMap, and cleanup some now superfulous null checks
javadoc_before:
/**
   * Trim the trailing '/' if its there.
   * 
   * we want:
   *  /update/csv
   *  /update/csv/
   * to map to the same handler 
   * 
   */
javadoc_after:
/**
   * Trim the trailing '/' if its there, and convert null to empty string.
   * 
   * we want:
   *  /update/csv   and
   *  /update/csv/
   * to map to the same handler 
   * 
   */
